allow: Bash(npm info reveal.js@5.2.1 dist.tarball 2>/dev/null | head -5; npm info pdfjs-dist versions --json 2>/dev/null | tail -c 200)
Bash(npm info socket.io@4.8.3 version 2>/dev/null; npm info multer version 2>/dev/null; npm info express version 2>/dev/null)
Bash(hostname -I 2>/dev/null; ip route get 1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'src \\K\\S+' || true)
Bash(sudo ufw status 2>/dev/null || true; sudo iptables -L INPUT -n 2>/dev/null | grep -E '3000|ACCEPT|DROP' | head -20 || true)
Bash(sudo ufw allow 3000/tcp comment 'teach-system' && sudo ufw status)

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
for f in ['public/css/style.css','public/teacher.html','public/viewer.html']:
    txt = open\(f\).read\(\)
    vars = sorted\(set\(re.findall\(r'var\\\(--[\\w-]+\\\)', txt\)\)\)
    print\(f, len\(vars\), 'vars'\)
    for v in vars: print\(' ', v\)
    print\(\)
")
